description: Focused 40-50s clip of AI Write: open a blank doc, type a rough draft, tap sparkles, choose Improve, see the polished result, return home. Requires an active AI provider configured in mChatAI+ for the Improve step to stream output.

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Drafting better — without leaving the keyboard.

scenes.name: Tap AI Write
scenes.narration: AI Write is a clean editor with AI built right in.
scenes.fallbackNarration: AI Write opens a clean editor with AI built in.

scenes.name: Type a rough draft
scenes.narration: Start with whatever you've got - rough is fine.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Just type whatever you've got - rough drafts are welcome.

actions.text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. its a beautiful day outside.

scenes.name: Tap the sparkles button
scenes.narration: Tap the sparkles for AI assistance.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap the sparkles to open the AI assist sheet.

scenes.name: Choose Improve
scenes.narration: Improve cleans up grammar and tightens prose in one shot.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pick from ten built-in writing actions.

scenes.name: Tap Improve
scenes.narration: Tap it and watch the rewrite stream back in real time.
scenes.fallbackNarration: The polished version streams in live.

scenes.name: Replace the draft
scenes.narration: Like what you see? Replace the draft with one tap.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Replace the draft or append the new text - your call.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Get mChatAI on the App Store today.
